data.name: DetailInstallPrompt
data.value: Select “Install ChatGPT” to download the latest version and open the system installer.

data.name: DetailWillDownload
data.value: The latest version will be downloaded.

data.name: StatusVerifyingPackage
data.value: Verifying the digital signature and package contents…

data.name: ErrorBadRange
data.value: The CDN returned an invalid range while resuming the download.

data.name: ErrorInvalidPackageUrl
data.value: Microsoft Store returned an invalid package address.

data.name: StatusUpToDate
data.value: The installed version is up to date

data.name: StatusPackageReady
data.value: The package is verified and ready to update

data.name: StatusPackageReadyToInstall
data.value: The package is verified and ready to install

data.name: DetailInstallerOpened
data.value: The MSIX installer is open. Select “Update” in the system window.

data.name: DetailInstallInstallerOpened
data.value: The MSIX installer is open. Select “Install” in the system window.

data.name: ErrorNoStorePackages
data.value: Microsoft Store returned no packages for this Product ID.

data.name: ErrorNoMatchingPackage
data.value: The Microsoft Store response contains no compatible x64 OpenAI.Codex package.

data.name: VerifyTooSmall
data.value: the file is missing or too small (a BlockMap may have been downloaded)

data.name: VerifyNoManifest
data.value: AppxManifest.xml is missing from the MSIX package

data.name: VerifyNoIdentity
data.value: Identity is missing from the package manifest

data.name: VerifyIdentityMismatch
data.value: the package identity does not match the expected OpenAI.Codex package

data.name: VerifySignature
data.value: Windows could not verify the MSIX digital signature
